text.message: maybe we wait until everyone has placed before we start making leaps?
idk oj said blue will win and I said gg blue lol
sure but let's look at the board and make some inferences. odds are oj takes army can we agree on that?
just follow the logic for a sec
anyone could go for road, but only red has a clear road netowrk
honestly yah nvm it probably will be gg oj with that 10 brick pickup
6 wheat block hurts me just as much and is balanced
you getting on the 5 ore with sheep port is def game over
ur at 4 with a city and a free card every 6
yeah I'm relying on two numbers
u can actually play knights even since every 6 is 2/3 of a dev
you have best production on board
ur not relying on two numbers, and even if u were, those two numbers are high rolls
and they're two very good rolls
you get 2/3 of a dev every 6. no single roll of mine does that
right which is why i said 6 is a balanced block if ur anticipating this settle
im not gaslighting, im saying you and i have comparable setups
while we're arguing we're losing the plot. you and i need to work together
my setup is def difficult to play
can u pop with ur hand currently?
i wanna help u dont pass so fast
i know, next time i can probably trade u something to action
can i give u a future sheep?
u had to play a knight there if u had it
we do wood for two sheep
guys i am not a threat comparing to oj haha
the trade just doesnt doo much for me
that's a game losing play probably
red i have a brick for u if u dont have a road to put down in the middle
won't do that you didn't help me when i wanted
just trying to help u protect road, your call

and oj's roads are too separated
im worried about the possibility they have a rb
and just need a good roll to fully connect
u r currently winning the road race yes
you will be if u dont secure road
